title: Briefing Cabin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Briefing Cabin''' was a briefing area on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']]. It contained a circular speaking stage, a top-notch [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]], computerized seats, and a [[Caf/Legends|caf]] dispenser.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
